examples: He would be "Alastair", a conjuror's assistant, still with the spectacles (a solitary dash of unruliness) but in a neat grey suit.
British adventurer Alastair Humphreys had ridden his bike around the world, walked across India, and rowed from Africa to South America.
If you haven't noticed, the backstreet boy educated at Blackpool grammar styles himself more grandly as Alastair Cooke, broadcaster extraordinaire.
Download the acceptance speech delivered by Alastair Clark on behalf of NIACE from the documents sidebar.
With Blair on the bench and Cusiter absent, Glasgow lock Alastair Kellock will captain the side.
